deprecation_notice: Echo types have been removed. Echo is a single unified submission type. Context readiness (CRL/CC) determines what actions are allowed. Verification (V0-V8) remains independent. See /api/context-readiness-levels.json and /api/verification-levels.json.
limitations: Echo types have been deprecated. This file is kept for backward compatibility only.
does_not_prove: Echo types have been deprecated. This file does not prove anything.
